title: [ARCH] Formalize SQLite migrations for session store
description: Keep rusqlite storage backend; add migration crate and structured schema migrations to reduce manual PRAGMA version drift risk while preserving existing sessions/messages/input_history tables.

logs.msg: Planning context captured in ai/design/runtime-stack-integration-plan-2026-02.md. Keep rusqlite storage backend; add migration tooling only.
Existing if-version-<N chain in init_schema() is already structured and correct. Adding a crate would add complexity without benefit. Closing won't-do.
